what: Query vector store for semantic matches if text query
why: Supplement keyword matching with semantic understanding

output.console: Semantic search results with similarity scores

success_handling.criteria: Vector store query returns semantically similar entries with similarity scores above the minimum threshold

error_handling.criteria: Vector store is not initialized or connection fails
error_handling.action: Skip semantic search, rely on keyword results only, log warning

event.message: Vector store unavailable, skipping semantic search: {error}

error_handling.criteria: Parsed query contains only structured filters (tags, category) with no free text component
error_handling.action: Skip semantic search, proceed with keyword results only

event.message: No text query for semantic search, skipping

decisions.outcome: Proceed to merge-results step with both keyword and semantic results

decisions.condition: Vector store unavailable or no text query
decisions.outcome: Skip to merge-results step with keyword results only
